title: Modifiable Damage
description: Change how much damage you take from certain things, and make the game really easy or SUPER HARD.
body: # Modifiable Damage *Does not need to be installed on Client* Ever wanted to make fall damage hurt less, without completely turning it off? Hate falling through powdered snow and being damaged by it, as soon as you spawn in? If not, maybe you want to make Hardcore **harder** by bumping everything up to the max? Either way, Modifiable Damage allows you to easily update & change how much damage you take from certain sources, such as: - Burning (damage when IN fire or ON fire) - In Lava (separate from Burning) - Touching Magma Blocks (seperate from Burning) - Freezing - Drowning - Falling - Starving - General Damage (from Explosions, Mobs, etc.) ...all without the use of any commands or cheats! **Like this mod? Support me on Ko-fi and buy me a Hot Chocolate!** [](https://ko-fi.com/StupidRepo) ## Configure ### Singleplayer This mod uses MidnightLib. To configure this mod, click the ![MidnightLib symbol](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6db87aa875744df160c929f8880b3e9855c46e92.png) button in the normal Minecraft Options screen. It should be next to the "Online" tab. ### Multiplayer **Requires you to be OPed, or have access to the server console.** To update the configuration on a server, use this command: ``` /midnightconfig modifiable_damage ```
